questionHtml:
Mosaic Industries negotiates a new deal with their phone case supplier. Under the new deal, the supplier agrees to discount the cost of each case based on the number of cases purchased by Mosaic Industries. The cost charged by the supplier for each case can be found using the function

Cn=10-0.0001n

where n represents the number of cases sold by Mosaic Industries.

Calculate Mosaic Industries’ average monthly income, before any expenses, at this selling price.
markschemeHtml:
multiplying their answer to part (a) by 16                    (M1)

(average monthly income =) 16 × 4 000

64 000 EUR                    A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate Mosaic Industries’ average monthly income, before any expenses, at this selling price.
